name: Mandarin Orange Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp grated fresh orange peel (or lemon)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the filo as directed on package or recipe.
2. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese, ricotta, sugar, egg yolks, orange peel, and vanilla until smooth.
3. Stir in the drained mandarin oranges.
4. Pour filling into prepared crust; dot with additional orange zest if desired.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 50 minutes or until set.
6. Meanwhile, make syrup topping: combine sugar and water in saucepan over medium heat. Boil briefly, then reduce to simmer for 5 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in orange blossom water.
7. Allow cake to cool completely, then drizzle with cooled syrup.
8. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
